ddls:
CREATE TABLE "items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item */,
  "item_identifier" TEXT /* Identifier for the item */,
  "item_weight" REAL /* Weight of the item */,
  "item_fat_content_non_edible" REAL /* Non-edible fat content of the item */,
  "item_fat_content_regular" REAL /* Regular fat content of the item */,
  "item_visibility" REAL /* Visibility of the item */,
  "item_mrp" REAL /* Maximum retail price of the item */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item category */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item type */,
  "item_description" TEXT /* Description of the item */,
  "item_brand" TEXT /* Brand of the item */,
  "item_manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the item */,
  "item_packaging_type" TEXT /* Type of packaging */,
  "item_shelf_life" INTEGER /* Shelf life of the item in days */,
  "item_origin" TEXT /* Origin or country of the item */,
  "item_image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image of the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_items_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES item_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_items_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES item_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "outlets" (
  "outlet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outlet */,
  "outlet_identifier" TEXT /* Identifier for the outlet */,
  "outlet_size" REAL /* Size of the outlet */,
  "outlet_location_type" REAL /* Location type of the outlet */,
  "outlet_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the outlet type */,
  "outlet_address" TEXT /* Physical address of the outlet */,
  "outlet_city" TEXT /* City where the outlet is located */,
  "outlet_state" TEXT /* State where the outlet is located */,
  "outlet_country" TEXT /* Country where the outlet is located */,
  "outlet_zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the outlet */,
  "outlet_opening_date" TEXT /* Date the outlet opened */,
  "outlet_closing_date" TEXT /* Date the outlet closed, if applicable */,
  "outlet_manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the outlet manager */,
  "outlet_manager_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the outlet manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outlet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_outlets_outlet_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("outlet_type_id") REFERENCES outlet_types ("outlet_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "outlet_types" (
  "outlet_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outlet type */,
  "outlet_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the outlet type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outlet_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item being sold */,
  "outlet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the outlet where the item is sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date when the item was sold */,
  "sale_amount" REAL /* Amount of the sale */,
  "sale_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item sold */,
  "sale_discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the sale */,
  "sale_tax" REAL /* Tax applied to the sale */,
  "sale_net_amount" REAL /* Net amount of the sale after discount and tax */,
  "sale_payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used */,
  "sale_employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who processed the sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_outlet_id FOREIGN KEY ("outlet_id") REFERENCES outlets ("outlet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_outlet_sales" (
  "item_outlet_sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item outlet sale */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item being sold */,
  "outlet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the outlet where the item is sold */,
  "item_outlet_sales" REAL /* Sales of the item from the outlet */,
  "sale_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item sold at the outlet */,
  "sale_discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the sale at the outlet */,
  "sale_tax" REAL /* Tax applied to the sale at the outlet */,
  "sale_net_amount" REAL /* Net amount of the sale at the outlet after discount and tax */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date when the item was sold at the outlet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_outlet_sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_outlet_sales_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_outlet_sales_outlet_id FOREIGN KEY ("outlet_id") REFERENCES outlets ("outlet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, data scientist, admin) */,
  "user_password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed) */,
  "user_phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "user_last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time of the user */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "user_supervisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's supervisor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_user_supervisor_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_supervisor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the sales data */,
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sale being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the sales data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "access_device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_sale_id FOREIGN KEY ("sale_id") REFERENCES sales ("sale_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "outlet_years" (
  "outlet_year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outlet year */,
  "outlet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the outlet */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year during which the outlet was operational */,
  "outlet_status" TEXT /* Status of the outlet during the year (e.g., operational, closed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outlet_year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_outlet_years_outlet_id FOREIGN KEY ("outlet_id") REFERENCES outlets ("outlet_id")
)
